steps.title: Use the proximity clue
steps.content: More Quito respondents reported using parks than Lima respondents did. But fewer Quito respondents lived within a 10-minute walk of a park, so proximity alone cannot explain the difference in park use.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported claims
steps.content: A mentions expectations not discussed, B questions survey accuracy without evidence, and C invents older sources. The text attributes the difference to something other than park proximity. The answer is D.
